findings.title: Migration missing rollback script
findings.why_it_matters: The existing pattern in this repo includes rollback scripts for every migration (e.g. supabase/migrations/rollback/20260426000001_notification_preferences_rollback.sql). Without a rollback, reverting the schema change after a bad deploy requires manual SQL in production.
findings.suggested_fix: Create supabase/migrations/rollback/20260429000001_pending_deletions_rollback.sql containing: `BEGIN; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.pending_deletions; COMMIT;`
evidence: supabase/migrations/rollback/ directory contains rollback scripts for each migration

residual_risks: pending_deletions has no TTL/expiry — relies on S11 for cleanup. If S11 is delayed, rows with deleted user emails accumulate indefinitely.
testing_gaps: No migration test verifying RLS blocks authenticated users from reading pending_deletions
